  - Code review processes (requesting/receiving)
  - Development workflows (planning, execution, completion)

4. File patterns:
- Consistent naming: SKILL.md for main skill docs, supplementary files for details
- Daily files use ISO date format (YYYY-MM-DD)

No errors detected. Output shows active project with 9 days of logged activity and comprehensive skill documentation system.
